+                Steps = [

+                    "Add taco seasoning and water, simmer until thickened.",
+                    "Warm tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave.",
+                    "Fill tortillas with seasoned beef.",

+                ],

+            },

+                Id = 5, Title = "Pad Thai", Category = "Thai",
+                Description = "A classic Thai stir-fried noodle dish.",
+                Ingredients = ["Rice noodles", "Shrimp", "Eggs", "Bean sprouts", "Green onions", "Peanuts", "Tamarind paste", "Fish sauce", "Lime"],
+                Steps = [

+                    "Make sauce by mixing tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar.",
+                    "Stir-fry shrimp until pink, push to the side, scramble eggs.",
+                    "Add noodles and sauce, toss until noodles are tender.",
+                    "Add bean sprouts and green onions, toss briefly.",

+                ],

+            {
+                Id = 6, Title = "Guacamole", Category = "Mexican",
+                Description = "Fresh and creamy avocado dip.",
+                Ingredients = ["Avocados", "Lime juice", "Red onion", "Cilantro", "Jalapeño", "Tomato", "Salt"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Halve avocados and remove pits.",
+                    "Mash avocado flesh in a bowl to desired consistency.",
+                    "Stir in finely diced onion, jalapeño, and tomato.",
+                    "Add lime juice, chopped cilantro, and salt to taste.",
+                    "Serve immediately with tortilla chips."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 9, RatingSum = 40
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 7, Title = "Miso Soup", Category = "Japanese",
+                Description = "A light and savory traditional Japanese soup.",
+                Ingredients = ["Dashi stock", "Miso paste", "Tofu", "Wakame seaweed", "Green onions"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Bring dashi stock to a gentle simmer.",
+                    "Rehydrate wakame in water, then drain.",
+                    "Cube tofu into small pieces.",
+                    "Dissolve miso paste in a ladleful of hot dashi, then stir back into the pot.",
+                    "Add tofu and wakame, heat without boiling.",
+                    "Serve garnished with sliced green onions."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 7, RatingSum = 30
+            },
+            new Recipe

+                Description = "Individual cakes with a molten chocolate center.",
+                Ingredients = ["Dark chocolate", "Butter", "Eggs", "Sugar", "Flour", "Vanilla extract"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease ramekins and dust with cocoa.",
+                    "Melt chocolate and butter together, then let cool slightly.",
+                    "Whisk eggs, sugar, and vanilla until thick and pale.",
+                    "Fold chocolate mixture into the eggs, then fold in flour.",
+                    "Divide batter among ramekins and bake for 12-14 minutes.",
+                    "Let stand 1 minute, then invert onto plates. Serve immediately."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 20, RatingSum = 95
+            }
+        ];
+        _nextId = 9;
+    }
+
+    public List<string> GetCategories() =>
+        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
+
+    public List<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category) =>
+        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id) =>
+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.TotalRatings++;
+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }
+    }
+
+    public Recipe AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = submission.Title,
+            Category = submission.Category,
+            Description = $"A community-submitted {submission.Category.ToLowerInvariant()} recipe.",
+            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList(),
+            Steps = submission.Steps
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList()
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+        return recipe;
+    }
+}

data.content:
Build succeeded with zero errors and zero warnings. Here's what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeSharingApp/` — Blazor Web App (.NET 11, Server interactivity)

**Pages:**
- **`/`** — Homepage showing 6 recipe categories (Italian, Indian, Mexican, Thai, Japanese, Desserts) as cards
- **`/category/{name}`** — Browse recipes in a category with star ratings and descriptions (static SSR)
- **`/recipe/{id}`** — Full recipe page with ingredients, steps, and an interactive star-rating widget
- **`/submit`** — Interactive form to submit a recipe (title, category, ingredients, steps)

**Key design decisions:**
- **Static SSR by default** — Home, Category, and Recipe pages render server-side (read-only)
- **`@rendermode InteractiveServer`** only on `StarRating` and `SubmitRecipe` — the two components needing click/form interactivity
- **`RecipeService`** registered as singleton with 8 seed recipes across 6 cuisines
- Nav updated with Home + Submit Recipe links

Run with `cd RecipeSharingApp && dotnet run`.
